TableDescription: Minimal finds from open grassland; the plains offer little cover but patient searching yields basics.
Decent plains foraging; tubers and small game are reliable if you know what to look for.
Excellent grassland finds; a skilled hunter-gatherer returns with a meaningful haul.
A rare plains find; an unusual specimen that stands out from the monotony of the open grassland.
Minimal finds in the murky swamp; the wetlands are hazardous but yield odd and useful things.
Decent swamp foraging; the marsh provides niche components valued by herbalists and alchemists.
Excellent swamp finds; deep in the mire lie rare specimens that reward the persistent searcher.
A rare swamp discovery; a volatile or potent specimen lurking in the darkest part of the bog.
Minimal coastal finds; the shoreline provides basic sustenance for those who search the tideline.
Decent coastal foraging; the sea provides reliable food and useful materials to a savvy scavenger.
Excellent coastal finds; a skilled fisher-forager lands a significant catch and useful reagents.
A rare coastal discovery; an unusual specimen washed ashore or tucked in a hidden tide pool.
Minimal desert finds; survival in the wasteland demands hard-won knowledge to locate even scraps.
Decent desert foraging; a trained eye finds water sources and useful herbs among the dust.
Excellent desert finds; the wasteland yields hidden wealth for those who know where to dig.
A rare desert discovery; something dangerous or precious found in the deep wasteland.
Minimal arctic finds; the frozen wastes offer little but experienced hunters know where to look.
Decent arctic foraging; the cold preserves things well and seasoned survivors find reliable sources.
Excellent arctic finds; a skilled wilderness survivor locates prime sources amid the ice and snow.
A rare arctic discovery; something ancient or powerful preserved beneath the frost.
Minimal cave finds; without sunlight the options are slim but a careful eye spots what others miss.
Decent cave foraging; underground fungi and unique specimens reward those who explore deeper.
Excellent cave finds; the deep places hold minerals and fungi of surprising value and potency.
A rare underground discovery; an exceptional specimen gleaming in the dark where none expected to find it.
Minimal mountain finds; the high slopes are harsh but those who search find hardy provisions.
Decent mountain foraging; the thin air hides pockets of game and valuable alpine plants.
Excellent mountain finds; a trained alpine forager locates prime game and rare herbs above the treeline.
A rare mountain discovery; something precious found at the summit or in a cliff-face crevice.
Minimal urban finds; picking through rubble and alley margins yields only the most basic scraps.
Decent urban foraging; systematic searching of ruins turns up useful items and viable supplies.
Excellent urban finds; a thorough search of the ruins uncovers significant caches of supplies and materials.
A rare urban discovery; something valuable deliberately stashed or overlooked in the ruins.
